title: podman: Add support for blackhole routes
body:
This is #28230 but rebased on latest main. Original description below:

Add support for blackhole, unreachable, and prohibit route types in podman networks. These route types allow silently discarding packets (blackhole), rejecting with destination unreachable (unreachable), or rejecting with administratively prohibited (prohibit).

Note: Blackhole routes require netavark >= 2.0.0. Regular unicast routes remain backward compatible with all netavark versions.

Fixes https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/20222

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

<!--
Write `None` if there are no user-facing changes, otherwise enter your release note below.
Include "action required" if users need to take action when upgrading.
-->

```release-note
Add support for blackhole, unreachable, and prohibit route types in podman networks. Supported since netavark 2.0.
```

comments.body: Rerunning one flake, otherwise looks like this is ready. @containers/podman-maintainers PTAL
